author: Vincent C.
pros: Very easy to navigate even for those who are not great with computers or other software, support is great if you need it!
cons: I have not run into any major issues so far since trying Workday out, I've only used it for a few months at this point!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Pretty good, however the points addressed as dislikes should be addressed as it would make workday more robust
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: What I like is the reporting options available in the financials model. It allows us to reconcile grant spending within the award management team along with the depts as all data points are in Workday. Users with the report Writer role are able to construct their own reports and schedule output for specific users as needed. Everything from award creation to sponsor billing can be done from one system.
cons: There are constraints regarding billing for sponsors on grants for expenses posting outside of award line dates if the company is using a different system for timekeeping. There are also no award or grant compliance checks in workday leaving compliance auditing at risk

description: The overall experience with the software is good. As this is a very detailed and comprehensive ERP program, sometime this system got stuck while either navigating into it or looking into the management reports
author: Amir N.
pros: Workday Financial Management is a detailed ERP program that manage all of your accounting and finance needs in accordance with the International Accounting Standards. It streamlines process for better and timely business decision making.
cons: Since this is a detailed accounting ERP program, its hard sometimes when navigating and finding details while posting transactions. You need to click various tabs before getting into the correct string and often system got hanged
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Christina E.
pros: Easy to find transactions, sort, and filter
cons: Lots of irrelevant data fields crowd the page. Difficulty knowing which do use.

review_title: Review of Workday Fin from VP of Fin Sys
author: Jason M.
pros: Workday Financial Management provides a comprehensive financial management solution that seamlessly integrates complex financial processes into a single, unified system, allowing organizations to streamline their financial operations with unprecedented efficiency. By offering a centralized platform that connects various financial reporting and analysis functions, the system eliminates data silos and enables finance teams to gain holistic insights across different departments and financial domains.
cons: The releases usually only have small enhancements for the financial side. I really think they could put some power behind that.

description: I like that it is so intuitive and easy to navigate. It has a lot of useful functions with and does a good job of keeping lots of important financials organized in a one stop shop.
author: Ashley B.
pros: I love that this is a one stop shop for all of the throngs that I need to access as an employee of a global business.
cons: I wish that there was a little bit more customization opportunity since it ends up being a hub for many needs but doesn’t align with our brand guide.

description: Overall, my experience was positive. Workday is strong for standardizing financial processes, improving data accuracy, and enabling timely reporting and analysis, especially in larger organizations. Once users are trained and the system is configured well, it’s a reliable platform that supports scalable financial operations.
author: Momin C.
pros: I liked the unified platform and real-time visibility—being able to pull consistent data across finance and operations without bouncing between tools. Reporting and dashboards made it easier to spot trends quickly and support faster, more informed decisions.
cons: Some workflows can feel rigid or overly structured, especially when exceptions come up and you need quick adjustments. Also, reporting can have a learning curve—getting very specific/custom outputs sometimes requires more configuration or expert help than you’d expect.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A very good tool for companies
description: Workday Financial Management beneficts from streamlined processes and solid reporting, but setup and navigation can be challenging at times.
author: Andy M.
pros: Workday Financial Management is a very usefull tool for companies, it simplifies finance with real-time insights.
cons: I don't have anything really negative to say except for the fact that it has a complex setup and limited customization

description: Okay overall, don’t really see anything outstanding compared to other financial softwares
author: Tiffany Y.
pros: Allows user to save particular reports for easy access in the future, especially great if you need recurring reports.
cons: There should be some sort of a filter feature. I find it troublesome when looking up vendor in the search bar, but unable to refine by cost center or BU without going through pulling the ledger entries.

description: The system functions as expected and is a great tool to use.
author: Jessica B.
pros: There so much that can be done and Workday helps to streamline many of our manual processes and workflows.
cons: The system is difficult to navigate and things are are to find. The overall design experience could use some improvement.

description: I would recommend to other people looking for a easy program.
author: Amanda A.
pros: Very easy to maneuver. Set up was nice and organized.
cons: The options that they gave for different things.

author: Brittany Y.
pros: This platform integrated really well into concur for creating and removing user profiles. It was a nice solution for automating what was previously a manual process.
cons: There were not any negatives in my experience.

description: I use workday to keep track of all my important company information. Overall I would say it's a good platform, but it needs some updating to make it more user friendly. Epically the time and absence widgets. I'm not a huge fan of how this program functions.
author: Rachel S.
pros: I like being able to access my personal information, my performance, my time, my benefits, etc. all in one location.
cons: I don't like how difficult it is to track my time. We have a lock out every week and it is difficult to keep track of the hours I work. I usually have to write them down on a sticky note and transfer them back in once the lock out is over. Very inconvenient. I also don't like how I have to go to a different screen to include my absences like PTO or Maternity leave. It's been somewhat of a mess trying to keep track of al my hours and benefits.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Implementation was easy and adoption of the program happened quicker than normal from other programs.
cons: Customer Service representatives could be friendlier.

description: When we initially started using this product it was very cumbersome. It improved some of our old processes but then seemed to make other worse. It has either gotten better or we have just gotten use to it. We have also had some issues with invoices getting lost in the system and had to recreate them in order to get them to process. They recently changed the requisition creation and it is not clear what the end user needs to do once they enter a line item. Overall I like the product but I feel it could still be improved. We just started using the HR function this week and so far I like what I see.
author: Kelli T.
pros: The reporting capabilities and the ability to drill down in functions to get to the info you need.
cons: Not always user friendly. The error notes are not very helpful in pointing you to the specific line that has an issue.

review_title: Friendly and easy to use interface. Very powerful report and data sorting tool
author: Shiawtian C.
pros: I like the easy access to different reports. I can put down information the way I want it and dive deeper into the data if I need to. Everything is linked and stored in an easy to navigate format so you will have an easy time looking for what you need.
cons: I don't like that reports can take a while if the data size is fairly large. Also if you attempt to click around too much before Workday process what you want it to do, you will get an error message. It is very easy to create this error message if you click around too much without giving it some time.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: it does the job at the end of the day and you can structure the tabs easily.
cons: The look is very much aged and basic. A bit of a face lift would help the user experience.

description: My overall experience in Workday was fantastic. I would recommend it to everyone.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I love the aesthetics and the ease of use. I am not a lover of numbers but Workday made it almost seem fun to do my accounts through here. It's easy to use, to track your finances and make changes when needed. There is no fuss, no hiccups, just easy and almost fun to use because it works smoothly.
cons: Nothing. I can't think of anything to help improve this system. I love it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Not completely bad, but not user friendly.
description: I use it mainly to look at my check stubs, but it does that quite well.
author: Sasha B.
pros: I like that once you figure it out it's simple to use, and make it easy to access your information.
cons: It's not too user friendly when you first start using it. It definitely takes some getting used to.

description: Overall I have had a good experience with Workday
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Workday is an easy to use time management software. Unlike a lot of internal time management software Workday can be used through their app on your phone. It is convenient if something comes up and you need to make an adjuster to you work schedule on the run.
cons: Overall I do not have any complaints about Workday

review_title: All details at one place and easy to handle
author: Rajesh S.
pros: GUI interface.Easy to use...and user friendly. I am using this from past 2 years and its awsome tool.
cons: The charts can be improved , taking out the reports is not not so easy and can be improved further.

review_title: Very practical and easy to use.
description: It's a great product and gets the job done.
author: Karla C.
pros: I love how user friendly it is. You can find anything and everything with ease.
cons: Can't think of any major complaints besides the goal setting portion which is hard to walk thru.

author: David M.
pros: It allowed us to manage everything to do with payroll as an employee.
cons: Some features were difficult to find at first but customer support helped.

review_title: Workday is an easy-to-use software that keeps everything in one place
description: I am very satisfied with the use of workday in our company.
author: Kellie H.
pros: It's easy to understand, and I do not have trouble finding what I need it. It is simple to use and effeicent for our personal management needs.
cons: Requesting absences is not often a smooth process. There are often errors that pop up that are not accurate.

review_title: Workday is Simple to Use and Effective
description: Great for jobs where you are scheduling a variety of users.
author: Teresa Herbic H.
pros: Workday is highly effective and easy to use. It is streamlined and user friendly. It's a very straightforward accounting software program.
cons: You have to find a specific link for your company, and it can be difficult to find. That's the only issue.
